description_long: This is a two-tone baseball cap with a white front panel and blue side, top, and brim sections. The front of the cap features the text 'HumAi CLUB' in a modern, sans-serif font, with 'Ai' highlighted in blue. The cap has a structured, rounded crown with visible stitching and a button at the top. The brim is slightly curved and matches the blue color of the sides and back. On the left side, there is a small rectangular patch with the same 'HumAi CLUB' branding. The overall design is sporty and contemporary, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A white and blue baseball cap with 'HumAi CLUB' branding on the front and side, featuring a structured crown and curved brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'HumAi CLUB' logo prominently on the white panel and the blue curved brim.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the blue side panel and a small rectangular 'HumAi CLUB' patch, with the brim extending forward.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the blue crown, central button, and the seam lines converging at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue side and back panels, with the white front panel partially visible.
